title: My Kingdom for a Cook
writer: Harold Goldman, Andrew Solt, Jack Henley
actors: Charles Coburn, Marguerite Chapman, Bill Carter
plot: Rudyard Morley, an eccentric ambassador from the Court of Saint James, is on a goodwill lecture tour of the United States. His English gourmet cook is unable to accompany him, and this upsets him more than a little bit. He hires a...
